title: Mouse Model Creation Protocol
author: Kent Lloyd
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.56gg9bw

steps.instruction: Depending on the type of mutant mouse requested, a number of protocols can be used. Investigators should consult with technical assistance staff at the MMPC @ UC Davis to develop their plan for deriving a mutant mouse.
